user_query: Help me find a market in Aukland where I can buy fishing gear. Give me information about nearby fishing spots and the types of fish available. Provide details about the different fish species, including their scientific classification and habitats.

TaskList.description: Find markets in Auckland that sell fishing gear.
Gather information about nearby fishing spots in Auckland.
Collect details about the different fish species available in nearby fishing spots.
Provide classification and habitat information for various fish species.
